prose: Fukui reactivity indices for furan computed at the DFT level using the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (chemkit tier 'standard'), via PySCF RKS, in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Density fitting was OFF (exact four-centre integrals). The N±1 states used for finite-difference Fukui construction were: cation (charge +1, multiplicity 2) and anion (charge −1, multiplicity 2). Partial charges were computed by the Mulliken scheme in PySCF. All three SCF runs converged; sum(f+)=1.0000 and sum(f-)=1.0000. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true. No warnings reported. The headline value is the maximum f+ (most electrophilic site), at C5 (atom 5, 1-based), f+ = 1.9242931. The α-carbons (C4, C5) adjacent to oxygen show the largest positive dual descriptors (+1.76), consistent with the known EAS reactivity of furan at the 2- and 5-positions.
